playlist_strategy: A cinematic and aggressive progression starting with disciplined mental preparation, escalating into intense, heavy, and explosive battle-ready tracks, and concluding with a triumphant and steady cooldown.

tracks.title: Enter the Arena
tracks.youtube_title: Enter the Arena ⚔️ Warrior Mental Focus | Warm-Up
tracks.hook_type: Ominous brass swells with slow, intentional tribal percussion.
tracks.style_prompt: Cinematic orchestral trap instrumental, D minor, 85 BPM. Slow tribal taiko drums, ominous dark brass swells, deep sub bass, rhythmic atmospheric cello, building tension.
tracks.image_prompt: A lone warrior focusing in a dark ancient stone room lit by a single beam of light, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, 8k
tracks.youtube_description: Prepare your mind for the path ahead. This epic cinematic trap instrumental is designed for deep focus and mental preparation before your most intense warrior training sessions.

tracks.title: Iron Resolve
tracks.youtube_title: Iron Resolve 🛡️ Epic Viking Workout Music | Build up
tracks.hook_type: Chanting male choir over a rhythmic, driving drum beat.
tracks.style_prompt: Nordic folk metal instrumental, A minor, 105 BPM. Driving heavy tom drums, rhythmic tagelharpa patterns, distorted electric guitar chugs, deep atmospheric male choir chanting, aggressive groove.
tracks.image_prompt: A heavily armored Viking warrior standing in a snowy landscape gripping a battle axe, dramatic storm clouds, epic cinematic composition
tracks.youtube_description: Feel the strength of the ancients. This driving Nordic folk metal track slowly builds the fire in your veins, perfect for getting your blood flowing before the real battle begins.

tracks.title: Bloodline
tracks.youtube_title: Bloodline 🩸 Aggressive Phonk for Heavy Lifts | Beast Mode
tracks.hook_type: Distorted cowbell melody hitting immediately with a brutal 808.
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive drift phonk instrumental, Eb minor, 120 BPM. Distorted punchy cowbell melody, blown-out 808 bass, fast trap hi-hats, gritty lo-fi vocal chops, immediate high energy drop.
tracks.image_prompt: A fierce modern gladiator in an underground fighting cage, neon red lighting cutting through fog, hyper-detailed, aggressive atmosphere
tracks.youtube_description: Time to flip the switch to beast mode. This aggressive drift phonk banger delivers pure high-octane energy to push you through your first heavy sets of the day.

tracks.title: Spartan Sprint
tracks.youtube_title: Spartan Sprint ⚔️ High Energy HIIT Anthem | Push Harder
tracks.hook_type: Grinding metallic bass patches locking in with heavy four-on-the-floor kicks.
tracks.style_prompt: Industrial midtempo bass instrumental, G minor, 110 BPM. Cyberpunk aggressive synth design, heavy distortion, punchy acoustic drums mixed with electronic claps, metallic sound effects, high energy.
tracks.image_prompt: A futuristic spartan cyborg sprinting through a dystopian industrial complex, motion blur, glowing neon green accents, cinematic action shot
tracks.youtube_description: Keep your feet moving and your heart racing. This heavy industrial midtempo banger provides the perfect relentlessly driving beat for HIIT cardio and intense athletic conditioning.

tracks.title: Conquer the Peak
tracks.youtube_title: Conquer the Peak ⛰️ Unstoppable Hardstyle | Max PR Music
tracks.hook_type: Massive euphoric synth lead exploding into heavily distorted climax kicks.
tracks.style_prompt: Euphoric hardstyle instrumental, F# minor, 150 BPM. Massive distorted hardstyle kick tail, uplifting and emotional supersaw synth melody, huge stadium reverb, energetic fast and bouncy groove.
tracks.image_prompt: A triumphant warrior holding a heavy weapon above their head on a mountain peak, epic golden hour lighting, lightning striking in the background, extremely dramatic
tracks.youtube_description: This is what you've trained for. Hit your absolute limits with this massive euphoric hardstyle anthem designed to give you the ultimate adrenaline spike for your new PR.

tracks.title: War Cry
tracks.youtube_title: War Cry 💀 BrutaL Deathstep | Pure Rage Workout
tracks.hook_type: Machine-gun bass stutters and violently heavy snaredrops.
tracks.style_prompt: Deathstep tearout dubstep instrumental, C# minor, 130 BPM. Extremely violent distorted growl bass, heavy metal guitar chugs backing the bass, incredibly punchy snare, chaotic and aggressive drops, pure rage.
tracks.image_prompt: A demonic berserker warrior screaming in rage amidst a battlefield of fire and brimstone, highly detailed, dark fantasy art, incredibly intense
tracks.youtube_description: Channel your inner rage. When your muscles give out, let the pure brutality of this extreme deathstep track force out those final, agonizing reps to achieve total destruction.

tracks.title: Gladiator's March
tracks.youtube_title: Gladiator's March 🏟️ Heavy Groove Metal | Never Surrender
tracks.hook_type: Thick, syncopated guitar riff locking perfectly with the double-kick drums.
tracks.style_prompt: Groove metal instrumental, E minor, 95 BPM. Extremely thick mid-tempo 7-string distorted guitar riffs, precise syncopated double kick drums, crushing bass tone, aggressive headbanging rhythm, no clean melodies.
tracks.image_prompt: A weathered gladiator standing in the center of the Colosseum wiping dust from armor, gritty cinematic realism, intense sun glare, raw and dirty atmosphere
tracks.youtube_description: Bite down and push through the pain. This heavy, punishing groove metal instrumental gives you the relentless stomping cadence you need to conquer your hardest training blocks.

tracks.title: Unbreakable
tracks.youtube_title: Unbreakable ⚔️ Epic Drum & Bass | The Final Push
tracks.hook_type: Hyper-fast intricate breakbeats paired with morphing, dark reese bass.
tracks.style_prompt: Neurofunk drum and bass instrumental, F minor, 174 BPM. Dark morphing reese basslines, incredibly fast and intricate breakbeat percussion patterns, technical sci-fi synthetic textures, rolling and unstoppable groove.
tracks.image_prompt: A highly agile futuristic ninja doing a parkour flip over an obstacle, heavy motion blur, cyberpunk city background, cool blue neon glows
tracks.youtube_description: Don't stop now. When fatigue sets in, let this hyper-fast, high-tech neurofunk drum & bass anthem carry you through your final cardio push and finishing circuits.
